recent_reviews.text: My granddaughter attends and I was thoroughly impressed with the things she's learned.  She expresses her enthusiasm for learning and her willingness to share.  She often talks about her friends and especially her teachers :).  I recently attended the graduation ceremony, and I might add, it was one of the best pre-kindergarten ceremonies I've ever attended.  The children were so well-mannered and recited all that they had learned, even the name/location of the school.  I commend the teachers/staff on a job well done!

When my child attended this school I had mix feelings. Her teacher for first grade was excellent! I couldn’t ask for a better teacher! I felt the P.E. and art could have been better. The playground could also been improved and lunch area. I recommend this school.

I'm doing student teaching at great expectations learning academy. It is a nice clean place for the children to thrive and learn. When I have children I hope the same staff will be their. They are passionate and professional ladies that I have learned from and I won't my own children to get the experience I had from G.E.L.A.

result.formatted_address: 2000 W Warren Blvd, Chicago, IL 60612, USA

recent_reviews.text: We have had a really great experience at Nook West Town. Our son is shy, so his first couple weeks he was very apprehensive about going to daycare. Every morning Ms Janeth is always there to meet our son with smiles and love. Ms Janeth along with Taleah, Shay and Jessica have created a loving and nurturing environment where our son is excited to go. The regular photos and updates are amazing for reassuring a first time mom dropping off her baby. The Nook West Town team were patient with our son as he learned how to be away from mom and dad and how to interact with his peers (especially in groups). We are sad to be leaving the Nook West Town at the end of the year, but so grateful for the time our son was able to spend there.

I truly recommend bringing your babies over to this Nook location. They are very kind, loving and nurturing towards every child. Ms. Jessica and Ms. Taleah are very great teachers, my smallest baby loves them. Also, Ms. Jocelyn is always being talked about from my oldest Tyke, he says he loves her very much and I can tell she has done a tremendous job with him. So far this has been a 10/10 experience for my boys.

I am so blessed to have discovered Nook West Town Childcare! The staff are extremely professional. The children love being there and the Lesson Plans are amazing! Mrs.Trina and the staff do an excellent job of keeping parents in the loop regarding important updates, children are greeted with a smile upon arrival not to mention the Spanish, Sign Language and STEM programs. Mrs. Trina, Janeth, Taleah, Shay, Jessica, Tierra, Rachelle and Tanya, YOU ROCK! Thank you all for assisting my "Glam Kids" on EXCEEDING their milestones!

recent_reviews.text: I gave them five stars for MANY reasons. My son is 20 months and has progressed rapidly. His vocabulary is growing. He amazes me each and every day we walk out of there. Being around kids his age., helps tremendously. They have a small class. But I felt comfortable right away when I spoke to Mrs. Donna. I am able to get updates throughout the day. And even photos. I uploaded a few I was sent. I would recommend them to anyone that was looking to put their child in daycare. Mrs. Donna & Mrs. Kellie are very compassionate, nurturing teachers. I trust my child in their care. Without any worry’s. They supple everything your child needs throughout the day. I don’t know how you wouldn’t want to call and see if they have openings.

I have never been so pleased! Both my girls both 3 and 1 attend this daycare. My oldest has been in attendance since 1 1/2 and my baby since 3 months! They are thorough and friendly. My children love the teachers and the care they give… so do I. My girls are always happy when they leave, fed and cleaned! The teachers are good with reaching out and responding to any needs or any concerns. 5 stars for 5 star! I hope to see more of this daycare’s expansion so more people can experience the care that the owner, Ms Donna, has taken in picking teachers and the care provided.

My son has been coming to 5 Star Child Care
Development Center for 6 months and is still currently. This has been the best experience for my son. Mrs. Donna is very passionate about her babies and the care she provides for them. I absolutely love the she runs her daycare facility. ❤️❤️❤️
